title: quercus ilex var. ballota
intro: Quercus ilex var. ballota, also known as the holly oak or holm oak, is a variety of the evergreen oak tree that belongs to the Quercus ilex species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. ballota are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
